steps.title: Submit New Vendor Request
steps.content: Complete the New Vendor Request form in the procurement portal. Include: vendor name, contact, category, estimated spend, and business justification.

steps.title: Required Documentation
steps.content: Vendor must provide: (1) W-9 or W-8BEN for tax. (2) Certificate of Insurance: General Liability $1M, Professional Liability $1M if services. (3) ACH/banking details. (4) Signed NDA if confidential. (5) Security questionnaire if handling data.

steps.title: Approvals
steps.content: Approval path: Requester's Manager → Category Lead → Procurement. For vendors over $100k annual: add Finance review. For data-handling vendors: add Security & Legal.

steps.title: SLA Expectations
steps.content: Standard onboarding SLA: 5 business days for complete packages. Incomplete submissions: 2 business days to request missing items. Expedited (urgent): 2 business days, requires VP approval.
